seo.description: KingOrnan is a B2B manufacturer of Custom PET Felt Acoustic Lighting, Acoustic Pendant Lights and Acoustic Linear Lights, with OEM/ODM support for architects, distributors, importers and commercial lighting projects.

faq.title: Common questions from importers, distributors and project buyers.
faq.text: Use this section to reduce repeated communication and guide visitors toward a qualified inquiry.

items.question: Can you make custom PET Felt Acoustic Lights?
items.answer: Yes. We support OEM/ODM customization for size, shape, PET Felt color, wattage, CCT, dimming, mounting accessories, logo and packaging.

items.question: What buyer types do you mainly serve?
items.answer: Lighting importers, distributors, acoustic panel brands, office furniture brands, building material wholesalers, contractors, designers, architects and acoustic consultants.

items.question: Can you provide samples before bulk orders?
items.answer: Yes. For custom projects, we recommend sample confirmation before mass production so the appearance, light effect, mounting method and packaging can be checked.

items.question: Can you support certificates for different markets?
items.answer: CE is available, and certificate requirements for specific target markets can be discussed according to product specification and order plan. Do not list certificates before confirmation.

seo.title: TR-XYM-0137 Acoustic Ring Pendant Light | PET Felt Acoustic Lighting Supplier
seo.description: Review TR-XYM-0137 Acoustic Ring Pendant Light specifications from KingOrnan, including PET Felt Acoustic Lighting options, OEM/ODM customization and B2B quotation support.

productDetail.title: Acoustic Ring Pendant Light
productDetail.text: PET Felt Acoustic Pendant Light with integrated LED illumination for offices, meeting rooms, hospitality interiors and commercial project supply.
productDetail.lineDrawingAlt: TR-XYM-0137 acoustic ring pendant line drawing

overview.title: Product Overview
paragraphs: TR-XYM-0137 is designed as a clean circular acoustic lighting form for project interiors. The PET Felt body helps soften the visual appearance of the fixture while contributing acoustic comfort around desks, tables and lounge areas.
The product can be specified with diffuser panel or microprismatic diffuser optics, multiple color temperatures, dimming options and Felt colors for OEM or project orders.

items: Suspension height and ceiling canopy options
